summary: Session 2 of 2 (set-terminal): the phased verification loop shipped in verify_session (--phase discovery: exhaustive-enumeration framing fanned out K=2 per the S1-measured config with per-call stamps/artifacts and one merged envelope; --phase supplementary: pre-remediation completeness critic fed the prior findings with a do-not-re-report instruction, provider diversity as a config preference that degrades loudly; --phase remediation-review: tree-to-tree fix delta from the recorded discoveryBaselineTree plus the auto-ledger, per-finding fix verdicts with machine-checked ledger-id coverage; omitted --phase = classic behavior, compat). Step 6/7 policy docs rewritten around the phases with bounded totals (<=2 discovery passes, <=2 remediation-review cycles; severity gate and operator round-cap authority preserved verbatim; echo sweep across constitution/diagram/strategy doc). Config seeded verbatim from the S1 memo (verification.discovery: fan_out 2, provider_diversity same-model). Convergence replay ran the frozen Set 095 corpus end-to-end through the shipped machinery: 4 rounds / $0.85 / VERIFIED with 6/6 fix verdicts accepted, exactly at the bounded totals, vs the 095 baseline's 17 non-converging rounds / $4.88 (a loop-shape demonstration, not a defect-for-defect A/B -- qualifications in s2-convergence-replay.md); the replay's remediation of five real Majors in the shipped 095 tutorial is preserved as s2-replay-fix.patch for operator scheduling. Release prep: ai_router 0.33.0 staged (CHANGELOG block, pyproject bump, stale __init__ fallback aligned; publish operator-gated). The session's own verification dogfooded the loop it shipped: discovery K=2 harvested 9 blocking findings (disjoint call sets), supplementary added 1 with zero re-reports, all were real defects in the new machinery, and remediation produced the hardening set (fail-closed verdict merge; phased-evidence bookkeeping excludes; fix-rejected anti-laundering escalation; ledger-id fix-verdict coverage enforcement; supplementary session-verdict fail-close; cycle-cap suspension; zero-parse envelope synthesis) with 23 new tests. Cycle 2 held one point (partial fix-verdict coverage); the loop SUSPENDED at its own bound and the point was then fixed deterministically (ledger ids) rather than adjudicated -- no third cycle was opened; the deciding round is the sanctioned Set 084 close backstop on the final tree. Suite: 3010 passed / 6 skipped.
deferred_issues: The five verified Major fixes to the shipped Set 095 tutorial deliverables (s2-replay-fix.patch, loop-VERIFIED on the replay worktree) are NOT applied to main -- application is a separate small docs set, operator-scheduled (the routed next-set analysis ranks it first).
PyPI publish of ai_router 0.31.0-0.33.0 and Marketplace publish of ext 0.42.0 remain operator-gated (release prep complete).

The fix-verdict ledger-id coverage check treats an id-less enumeration with a verdict per numbered finding as covered (count fallback) -- a deliberately tolerant edge for legacy-format reviews; the strict per-id path is what the framing prescribes and what reviewers followed in every live round this session.

RESOLVED BY OPERATOR ADJUDICATION (2026-07-13, option c: reshaped-context re-verify). The disputed replay-comparison finding (re-raised rounds 5-6 after being fix-accepted in rounds 3-4) was re-evaluated in round 7 with the operator adjudication context (falsifier is an indicative loop-shape demonstration by design; definitive comparative experiments rejected as confounded and disproportionate; deployment target is Copilot CLI with weaker models on a ~1-year tool horizon; consequence-oriented severity is operator policy, not a hypothesis under test). Round 7 (same verifier, gpt-5-6): VERIFIED, zero findings, explicitly grading the point as having no probable material consequence for the deliverable's real users. Adjudication logged via record_adjudication (cause=context-gap, resolution=reverify-reshaped). Operator-acknowledged follow-on candidates recorded for future sets: (a) optional background probe loop with a more liberal Major definition feeding a triage queue (large); (b) per-project configurable severity definition (small).
